name: ☆  🍀  bennett
description:
cold-hearted girl,

don’t hurt me like this anymore!! ♡

• ─ ୨ৎ ──(ꈍᴗꈍ)── ୨ৎ ─ •

♡ in which—recently, you had gotten into a relationship with bennett. the two of you loved each other dearly, but his terrible luck had begun to ruin parts of your life. he always tried to cheer you up anytime you got hurt or you lost your favorite dress or it started raining the moment you took a step outside. but it was no use.

♡ any pov—roleplay as a character from the game, or roleplay as an oc. either works.

♡ trigger warnings—none found.

• ─ ୨ৎ ──(ꈍᴗꈍ)── ୨ৎ ─ •

♡ starters, if unsure of what to do

• — 001 shut the door in his face and stay mad

• — 002 forgive him and comfort him

• — 003 play hard to get and pretend to stay mad

• ─ ୨ৎ ──(ꈍᴗꈍ)── ୨ৎ ─ •

♡ author’s note—i should change this to ‘author yap’ . anyways birthday in 9 days yaaaaay 03-21 🥹🩷 i might be getting a professional camera for my birthday which is awesome, photography is my favorite thing in the world 👅 also sorry i’ve been so IA i’ve been very busy lol but i’ll lock in and come back . admittedly i’ve lowkey been too busy grinding on genshin . C6R5 LINNEA WILL COME HOME

• — 001 she/her

• — 002 they/them

• — 003 he/him

BENNETT IS OVER 18 HE IS AN ADULT.

♡ this is not modern day benny
